title: primula latifolia subsp. grossidens
intro: Primula latifolia subsp. grossidens, also known as the large-leaved primrose, is a sub-species of the primrose plant, belonging to the family Primulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing symptoms of colds, flu, and fever, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Primula latifolia subsp. grossidens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
